channel.title: Comments on: Episode 21 – De Proef
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: David Little
item.dc:creator: David Little
item.description:
Just need to jump in and correct myself and expand another ...
The first in this Signature Reserve series was done with Tomme Arthur of Lost Abbey/Pizza Port.
Sorry Tomme.
http://beeradvocate.com/beer/profile/3521/37907
And this particular beer was brewed by Jason Perkins from Allagash along with De Proef.
Sláinte!
item.content:encoded:
Just need to jump in and correct myself and expand another …

The first in this Signature Reserve series was done with Tomme Arthur of Lost Abbey/Pizza Port.

Sorry Tomme.

http://beeradvocate.com/beer/profile/3521/37907

And this particular beer was brewed by Jason Perkins from Allagash along with De Proef.

Sláinte!
